backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including 3D hero section, scroll animations, essence section, fragrance notes storytelling, and signature collection with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, hooks, utilities, and configuration for the luxury fragrance website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, defining color palette and design tokens for the luxury fragrance brand.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that enables smooth scrolling and renders all major sections including navigation, hero, essence, fragrance notes, collection, philosophy, and ending sections.
frontend/src/components/BottleCard.tsx: Perfume bottle card component with intersection observer, scroll-based center detection for scale animation, and hover effects for the signature collection.
Full-screen section with animated gradient background and scroll-triggered fade-in animations for headline and body text about olfactory storytelling.
frontend/src/components/EndingSection.ts: Final immersive section with scroll-triggered bottle fade-out, headline reveal, and golden glow CTA button with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/EssenceSection.t: Ivory background section with scroll-triggered staggered fade-in animations for large serif headline and descriptive subtext about craftsmanship.
frontend/src/components/FloatingParticle: Renders 100 animated 3D particles using Three.js that rotate and float with sine-wave motion, styled with gold color and transparency.
frontend/src/components/FragranceNotes.t: Displays three fragrance note sections (Top, Heart, Base) with ingredients and images using the NoteSection component.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Main hero section with scroll-driven 3D perfume bottle animation, including rotation, atomizer press, mist spray effects, and sound playback triggered at specific scroll positions.
frontend/src/components/IngredientVisual: Displays an ingredient image with fade-in and scale animation on load, plus a gradient overlay.
frontend/src/components/LazyImage.tsx: Implements lazy loading for images using IntersectionObserver, loading images only when they enter the viewport with a 100px margin.
frontend/src/components/MistSpray.tsx: Renders 500 animated 3D particles that spread outward and upward to simulate perfume mist spray, controlled by mistProgress prop.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar that becomes translucent with backdrop blur on scroll, containing brand logo and links to story, notes, and collection sections.
frontend/src/components/NoteSection.tsx: Scroll-animated section displaying fragrance note information with parallax effects on text and image, including type, title, description, and ingredient tags.
3D perfume bottle model with cylindrical geometry, metallic materials, animated cap/atomizer that moves down on press, and H&H label text.
frontend/src/components/ScrollProgress.t: Fixed vertical progress bar on the right side that fills based on page scroll percentage.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCollect: Horizontal scrolling collection section displaying three perfume bottles with scroll-driven transform animation and sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/SoundToggle.tsx: A fixed-position toggle button component that uses Zustand store to enable/disable sound effects, displaying Volume2 or VolumeX icons with luxury styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance, automatically recreating it when Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using @dfinity/auth-client, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal placeholder file for data queries; currently empty as all content is static and rendered client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useSound.ts: Zustand store and hook for managing sound state with a playSpray function that generates spray sound effects using Web Audio API oscillators.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with luxury color palette (black, ivory, deep gold), custom animations (float, gradient, shimmer), Cormorant Garamond and Inter fonts, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/lib/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that enables native CSS smooth scrolling behavior on the document root with cleanup support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with luxury color system using OKLCH, custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Inter), spacing, shadows, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining an award-winning luxury perfume website with 3D bottle interactions, scroll-triggered animations, fragrance storytelling sections, and detailed architectural notes for scroll libraries, performance optimization, and design system.
